steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is C, $7$.

steps.title: Apply the zero product property
steps.content: Since $-4\ne 0$, the solutions come from setting each binomial factor of $-4(w-7)(w-3)(w+8)=0$ to zero, giving $w=7,\ 3,\ -8$.

steps.title: Match a choice
steps.content: Among the options $-4,\ -3,\ 7,\ 8$, only $w=7$ appears in the solution set. That is the correct answer.
